review_title: Many interesting features, covers more than it can control
description: It covers some basic SEO needs and its price is really accessible to start with any tool. It works and it's good, but in some ways it falls short.
author: Juan Ignacio G.
pros: The audit tool is very complete and allows to identify basic problems of SEO structure such as duplicates and missing metadata. I really like the possibility of exporting the data ready to present in PDF documents
cons: The off page was not completely reliable; I use other tools for this in which I trust and show different data in many aspects. I think it is one of the cases in which they wanted to cover all areas of SEO and failed. Maybe they should focus on On SEO that have more potential.

review_title: Its a nice rank tracking tool
description: I find it a easy tool to use.
author: Darren G.
pros: Ease of use has to be the best thing and the forecasting capability
cons: It seem to be creeping up in price, which is not ideal

description: A tool that has enormous potential but it needs to adjust small details, continuous optimizations and more approach with the clients to give feedback.
author: Juan L.

review_title: A great on page SEO optimization tool with reasonable price
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I have used this tool for some of my hobby projects and it looks promising. It very easy to use and effective for on page seo analysis. I think this tool has a lot of potential.
cons: It can be a lot better comparing other seo tools in the market. But the value for money is quite good.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Terrible, unstable product that works one day and not another
description: Terrible. Stay away from this trash product that bills you without even working regularly
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It was seemingly useful in the first days of using it, until it kept deleting my leads and stopped working.
cons: It doesn't work and you literally lose leads. It breaks on implementing a few days after and the data is regularly, and surely lost.

description: You get what you pay for, and along with the low price comes a company that is unresponsive, and unwilling to keep their product up to date with the current Google standards. Not much point in providing your customers with audits that are incorrect.
author: Dale C.
pros: 1. Free widget that automatically does website audits and gathers leads for more comprehensive audits 2. Low price
cons: 1. Non-existent support (company NEVER responds to email and doesn't answer the phone) 2. Outdated functions that still use meta descriptions when they were over 300 characters 3. Is CONSTANTLY down and offline so the widget doesn't work half the time
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
